contents.text: Even though SkyAttack is designed for multiplayer, the mode can also be played solo. Plus, for the most part, you don't have to play on a team. If you want to play alone, you should create an island. If you want to join someone else's game, ask for the island number and select it when joining.

Once you've arrived on your island, your goal should be to settle in a bit and familiarize yourself with the systems. As soon as you feel ready, feel free to come back here to the island, and I'll explain what to do next.
